title: Better Entity Culling (BEC)
description: BEC (Better Entity Culling) is a lightweight client-side mod for Fabric that improves Minecraft performance by skipping the rendering of mobs, items, projectiles, and other entities that are outside your field of view.
body:
**A super lightweight, fully automatic client-side performance mod for Minecraft 1.21.1**

Warning: This mod is in Beta so it might not work as intended

BEC dramatically improves FPS and reduces visual clutter by **only rendering entities that are actually in front of you** — no config files, no commands needed, just pure smart culling.

### What It Does
Minecraft renders thousands of entities even when they're:
- Behind your back
- Way off to the sides
- Hidden behind terrain or walls (in view frustum)

BEC fixes that. It intelligently skips rendering:
- Mobs
- Dropped items
- Arrows, tridents, fireballs, snowballs, eggs, potions
- Boats & minecarts
- Armor stands
- Falling blocks (sand, anvils)
- Primed TNT

...if they're **outside your actual field of view cone** — using a smooth, adaptive 3D angle check based on your **current in-game FOV** (works with zoom, bow draw, potions, etc.).

### Why You'll Love It
- **100% automatic** — just install and forget
- Instantly smoother gameplay in mob farms, superflat worlds, item sorters, raids, and laggy servers
- Reduces GPU load and eliminates "invisible entity lag"
- No more rendering 5000 items behind your back
- Works perfectly in first-person, third-person, and cinematic camera

### Features
- True 3D FOV-based culling (yaw + pitch aware)
- Adapts to your current FOV in real-time
- Smooth 15° buffer zone (feels natural, no popping)
- Ultra optimized — near-zero performance cost
- Client-side only → safe on all servers (Vanilla, Spigot, Fabric, Forge via Sinytra, etc.)

### Commands (Optional)
- `/bec info` – See current status and active FOV
- `/bec toggle` – Temporarily disable/enable culling
- `/bec reset` – Restore defaults

### Compatibility
- Minecraft **1.21.1**
- Fabric / Quilt
- Works flawlessly with: **Sodium**, **Iris**, **Indium**, **Lithium**, **Starlight**, **ModernFix**, etc.
- Multiplayer-safe (no cheats, no server changes needed)

### Install
1. Install **Fabric** + **Fabric API**
2. Drop BEC into your `mods` folder
3. Launch and enjoy buttery-smooth entity rendering

**No config. No hassle. Just performance.**

Made with love for lag haters — by ZToast
